radio.name: Busy
radio.desc: Crew member is occupied, stand by.

radio.name: Out of Service
radio.desc: Unit is going offline / leaving session.

radio.name: In Service
radio.desc: Unit is online and available for assignment.

radio.name: Site Active
radio.desc: Construction site is open and crew is on location.

radio.name: Road Closure
radio.desc: Road is closed to civilian traffic. Barriers deployed.

radio.name: Road Reopened
radio.desc: Closure has been lifted. Traffic may resume.

radio.name: Equipment En Route
radio.desc: Heavy machinery is moving to or from the job site.

radio.name: Hazard On Site
radio.desc: Danger present — all units use caution in the area.

radio.name: Site Secure
radio.desc: Job site is cleared and secured. Session complete.

radio.name: Emergency
radio.desc: Urgent situation — all units clear the channel immediately.

radio.name: Confidential Info
radio.desc: Sensitive information — switch to private channel.

radio.name: Out of Character
radio.desc: Crew member needs to break RP briefly. Notify supervisor.

ranks.name: ⭐ CEO / Founder
ranks.reqs: Founder rank. Not earnable through promotions.
ranks.perms: Full authority. All sessions. Final decisions.

ranks.name: 🔱 Director
ranks.reqs: Appointed by CEO only. Exceptional track record required.
ranks.perms: Manage departments, approve promotions up to Foreman.

ranks.name: 🪖 Project Manager
ranks.reqs: Must be Foreman for 4 weeks. Lead 3+ sessions. Approved by Director.
ranks.perms: Host sessions, assign roles, manage all site workers.

ranks.name: 📋 Foreman
ranks.reqs: Must be Sr. Worker for 3 weeks. Pass foreman evaluation. Zero active strikes.
ranks.perms: Supervise workers, report incidents, assign tasks on site.

ranks.name: 🚛 Senior Worker
ranks.reqs: Worker for 2 weeks. 10+ sessions attended. Consistent performance.
ranks.perms: Access equipment operator role. Mentor trainees.

ranks.name: 🦺 Worker
ranks.reqs: Complete onboarding. Pass uniform check. Attend 3+ sessions as Trainee.
ranks.perms: Access all standard roles. Attend all sessions.

ranks.name: 🟢 Trainee
ranks.reqs: Application accepted. Starting rank for all new members.
ranks.perms: Attend training sessions. Limited site roles.

promoRules.title: Nomination Window
promoRules.text: Promotions are reviewed every Sunday at the Management Briefing. You must be nominated by a Foreman or above to be considered.

promoRules.title: No Self-Nomination
promoRules.text: You cannot nominate yourself for promotion. Asking management for a promotion directly may disqualify you from that cycle.

promoRules.title: Strike Freeze
promoRules.text: If you have an active strike on your record, you are ineligible for promotion until the strike expires or is cleared by management.

promoRules.title: Time-in-Rank
promoRules.text: Minimum time-in-rank requirements (see table above) must be fully met. Exceptions can only be made by the CEO or Director.

promoRules.title: Attendance Requirement
promoRules.text: You must have attended at least 60% of sessions during your current rank period to be eligible for promotion review.

promoRules.title: Conduct Standard
promoRules.text: Promotions are based on attitude, leadership, teamwork, and quality RP — not just how long you've been in the group.

items.label: Vest
items.desc: High-vis orange or yellow safety vest

items.label: Shirt
items.desc: Plain white or grey shirt underneath

uniforms.note: No accessories that obscure the vest. No hats other than the hard hat during sessions.

items.label: Prop
items.desc: Traffic flag or stop/slow paddle if available

uniforms.note: Traffic Control must always be visually distinct from standard workers on site.

items.label: Shirt
items.desc: Shadow Construction branded shirt if available

uniforms.note: White hard hat is required to visually identify you as Foreman to the crew.

items.label: Shirt
items.desc: Dark work shirt or branded tee

uniforms.note: Operators must stay in uniform even when inside vehicles during sessions.

items.label: Hard Hat
items.desc: White hard hat with "PM" label if possible

items.label: Pants
items.desc: Smart dark trousers or cargo pants

items.label: ID Badge
items.desc: Name tag or badge prop if available

uniforms.note: Project Managers represent the company image — dress to reflect that.

items.label: Hard Hat
items.desc: Green hard hat (industry standard for safety)

uniforms.note: Green hat and vest are key — they signal "safety" to all crew on the site.
